negative_prompt: text, letters, typography, UI mockup, watermark, logo text, cluttered, fills entire frame, no margin, photo of person unless requested

style_presets.gradient-abstract: abstract gradient composition, soft blended color planes, subtle grain texture
style_presets.isometric-illust: clean isometric illustration, smooth shading, consistent line weight, flat-to-semi-depth style
style_presets.3d-glow: glossy 3D abstract shapes, soft gradient, subtle volumetric light, floating geometric elements, studio render
style_presets.product-shot: minimal product shot composition, soft studio lighting, seamless gradient backdrop, shallow depth
style_presets.human-device: person interacting with a device, warm studio light, natural posture, slightly desaturated tones

vibe_map.shock: high contrast, saturated accent color, bold silhouette
vibe_map.calm: low contrast, soft muted palette, generous negative space
vibe_map.cozy: warm afternoon tones, soft glow, approachable composition
vibe_map.hype: vivid accent pop, diagonal energy lines, strong focal point
